description_long: This stereo sound system features a tall, rectangular cabinet with a wood grain finish, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The front face is divided into two sections: the upper portion is covered by a black fabric speaker grille, while the lower section has a circular bass port and a small label. The rear side includes a recessed control panel with various input/output connectors and switches, all set into the wood-textured surface. Both side panels are plain, showcasing the continuous wood grain pattern without any visible controls or openings. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for placement in living rooms, entertainment areas, or urban lounges. The materials and build suggest a robust and high-quality audio device intended for stationary use.
description: A tall, wood-finished stereo speaker with a black fabric grille, front bass port, and rear control panel. Its sleek, modern design is both functional and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the wood grain surface and a recessed control panel with connectors and switches near the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain wood grain panel with no visible features or controls.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the black fabric speaker grille on the upper section and a circular bass port with a small label on the lower section.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a continuous wood grain surface without any controls or openings.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille is a plain black fabric with a fine, uniform mesh texture and no visible decorative elements or geometric patterns.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the lower rear side, featuring a rectangular arrangement of connectors and switches, likely labeled for input/output and power functions.
